hero.title: Privacy
hero.subtitle: This website is a simple presentation site for Mad Hatter Records.

content.title: Data and cookies
content.text1: This website does not directly collect personal data through forms, accounts or analytics tools.
content.text2: Some embedded third-party content, such as YouTube and SoundCloud players, may use cookies or collect data according to their own privacy policies.
content.text3: By interacting with those players, you may provide data to those third-party services.
content.text4: YouTube and SoundCloud manage their own content and privacy practices independently.

hero.title: Let’s get in touch
hero.subtitle: If you want to talk about a collaboration, a recording project, a custom track, or simply ask a question, feel free to send a message.

card.title: Send a message
card.text: I’m always open to meaningful projects, artistic collaborations, and creative conversations. Fill out the form below and I’ll reply as soon as possible.

form.subjectPlaceholder: What would you like to talk about?
form.tooFast: You are sending the form too quickly. Please wait a few seconds and try again.
form.waitBeforeNext: Please wait {seconds} seconds before sending another message.
form.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
form.successStatus: Thanks. Your message has been sent.
form.errorStatus: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
form.emailSubject: New message from Mad Hatter Records

success.title: Message sent
success.text: Thanks for reaching out. I’ll get back to you as soon as possible.

collaborations.title: Collaborations
collaborations.text: Music production, recording ideas, custom tracks, arrangements, and creative partnerships.

responseTime.title: Response time
responseTime.text: I usually reply as soon as possible. Some messages may take a little longer depending on current projects.

direct.title: Direct and simple
direct.text: This form is the best way to get in touch without publicly exposing my email address.

hero.title: Bio
hero.subtitle1: Mad Hatter Records is the project studio of Dave Corleto.
hero.subtitle2: With a background in classical guitar, he gradually moved towards electric guitar, sound shaping and recording. Here, he creates music in a direct and honest way, avoiding overly constructed approaches and focusing on tone, space and atmosphere. An evolving path, driven by the search for authentic sound.

content.title: About the project
content.text1: Mad Hatter Records is a personal space to create music in a direct way, without unnecessary layers.
content.text2: The focus is on sound, its character, and how it moves in space, without chasing predefined aesthetics.
content.text3: More than showing technique, the project is about balance, identity and consistency.
